scripts.build: npm run build:game-server && npm run build:portal
scripts.test: npm run test:game-server && npm run test:portal
scripts.db:import:static: bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null && npm run build:game-server && npm run db:import:static -w @zo/game-server'
scripts.db:import:quest2: bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null && npm run build:game-server && npm run db:import:quest2 -w @zo/game-server'
scripts.db:import:static:purge: bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null && npm run build:game-server && npm run db:import:static:purge -w @zo/game-server'
scripts.db:import:characters: bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null && npm run build:game-server && npm run db:import:characters -w @zo/game-server'
scripts.db:import:all: bash -lc 'source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null && npm run build:game-server && npm run db:import:all -w @zo/game-server'
